comment: Airwindows TapeHack port. Drive into 11th-order Taylor sin, then output trim. Stateless, audibly aggressive.

params.name: Input
params.comment: params[5]. Pre-saturation level trim 0..2x. Default 50 = unity (1x). Knob 1, knob_id=2, LineSel knob1_edit handler.

params.name: Drive
params.comment: params[6]. Wet/dry blend AND preamp boost combined. 0 = bit-perfect dry, 100 = saturated polynomial at 3x preamp. Knob 2, knob_id=3, LineSel knob2_edit handler.

params.name: Output
params.comment: params[7]. Post trim 0..0.9x. Knob 3, knob_id=4, AIR knob3 (mix_edit) handler. First v2 plugin to exercise the 3rd-knob slot — UNVERIFIED on hardware (see ABI.md §5.3.b).
